mapper.select: select id, dish_id, available_stock, locked_stock, version, create_time, update_time from dish_stock where dish_id = #{dishId} for update
mapper.insert: insert into dish_stock (dish_id, available_stock, locked_stock, version) values (#{dishId}, #{availableStock}, #{lockedStock}, #{version})
mapper.update: update dish_stock set available_stock = #{availableStock}, version = version + 1 where dish_id = #{dishId} and #{availableStock} >= 0

update dish_stock set available_stock = available_stock - #{quantity}, locked_stock = locked_stock + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 where dish_id = #{dishId} and available_stock >= #{quantity} and #{quantity} > 0

update dish_stock set available_stock = available_stock + #{quantity}, locked_stock = locked_stock - #{quantity}, version = version + 1 where dish_id = #{dishId} and locked_stock >= #{quantity} and #{quantity} > 0
